label: capability search • skill • paraphrase
query: give me the gist of this article
notes: Probes the embed-still-needed class on the skills lane: 'gist' is a synonym of 'summarize' / 'tldr' / 'key-points' but shares no surface tokens with the 'Content Summarizer' skill's name, description, or keywords. BM25 will silently miss this; only the embedder can bridge it. If this case fails, the description audit (or expanding the keywords array) is the right fix — not BM25.
